query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: An upward-facing view of the sun shining through a dense atmospheric haze, framed by silhouetted palm trees and the vertical edge of a building on the left. The sky transitions from a bright yellow-green glow around the central sun to deep red and orange tones toward the periphery. Palm fronds extend into the frame from the top and sides, partially obscuring the sky, and the building facade shows rectangular structural elements against the illuminated background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A suffocating upward view of the sun barely penetrating a thick, oppressive haze that bathes the entire scene in a sickly, monochromatic red-orange cast. Silhouetted palm trees and a building edge emerge from the low-contrast, crushing atmosphere, creating an atmosphere of dread and environmental distress as the sky shifts from an intense yellow-green around the sun to deep, unsettling crimson at the frame edges.
